  • Uses of CreateVideoRequest in com.gpudb

    Methods in com.gpudb with parameters of type CreateVideoRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CreateVideoResponse
    GPUdb.createVideo(CreateVideoRequest request)
    Creates a job to generate a sequence of raster images that visualize data over a specified time.

    Method
    Description
    CreateVideoRequest

    The animated attribute to map to the video's frames.

    The start point for the video.

    Seconds of video to produce.
    CreateVideoRequest

    The end point for the video.
    CreateVideoRequest

    CreateVideoRequest

    Fully-qualified KiFS path.
    CreateVideoRequest

    The name of the visualize mode; should correspond to the schema used for the styleParameters field.
